lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Riiiiight...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just be over here if you need me.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: I got fish, you got gold?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but I don't want your fish.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: Then what are ye doin' in a fish shop? Looking fer work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Possibly, do you have any quests?

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: I dunno, I haven't gone through the last catch yet. What sort of a fish is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A quest isn't a type of fish!

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: Then I don't have any, and yer wastin' my time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to your legs?

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: Ye wanna know what happened to my legs?

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: Yer too much of a lilly-livered, hat wearin' landlubber to know what happened to my legs!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm not! I've seen some freaky stuff! I can take it!

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: All right, [lad/lass], since yer so insistent, I'll tell ye.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: See, I was clingin' onto a barrel, me ship havin' just had an encounter with this albatross.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: The sea was thrashin' and wild, but not so wild that I didn't see the fins of some sharks closin' in on me.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: I managed to yank a sliver of wood from the barrel just as one of them grabbed me from below, but I slipped down the things throat by about two feet before I managed te kill it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you survive?

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: A passin' ship saw the sharks and knew there would be survivors in the water. They sent a longboat and picked me up, but not before the sharks had taken off my legs.

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: And that [lad/lass] is why they call me two feet Charley, because they found me jammed two feet down a shark's throat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'm gonna be sick...

lines.speaker: Charley
lines.text: I knew ye couldn't handle the truth!
